title: SlimeLink
description: SlimeLink is an addon for Skript for interacting with ASP (AdvancedSlimePaper)
body:
SlimeLink

A modern Skript addon for seamless interaction with AdvancedSlimePaper.

## Documentation [![SkriptHubViewTheDocs](http://skripthub.net/static/addon/ViewTheDocsButton.png)](http://skripthub.net/docs/?addon=SlimeLink) ## Features SlimeLink lets you access the AdvancedSlimePaper API directly from Skript, using clean and intuitive syntax to easily create, load, save, and delete worlds. ## Requirements To utilize this addon, you need to ensure that you have Skript installed and that your server is running on the AdvancedSlime Paper/Purpur server software. Failure to follow these requirements means that the addon will not work. --- ## Third-Party Code Portions of this project (configuration structures, utilities, etc.) are derived from [AdvancedSlimePaper](https://github.com/InfernalSuite/AdvancedSlimePaper) (GPL v3.0). ## Credits - **ASWM Team & Contributors** - Paul19988 – ASWM Creator - ComputerNerd100 – Contributor & Maintainer - b0ykoe – Build Services & Repository Provider - Owen1212055 – Contributor & Maintainer - Gerolmed – Contributor & Maintainer - Grinderwolf – Original Creator - Glare – Maven Repository Provider - Minikloon & Hypixel Team – SRF Development ## License This project is licensed under the GPL v3.0. See [LICENSE](https://github.com/danielmillar/SlimeLink/blob/master/LICENSE) for details.
